release_notes: V14.44 build 198 trend buffer validation patch: aligns the Trend and Insulin Activity screens to use the same selected-window glucose slice from the fixed 12-hour buffer, slices IOB from the same 12-hour IOB buffer, adds internal validation for expected slots, valid points, gaps and 5-minute sequence, keeps real Nightscout gaps open without interpolation, adds Trend buf and IOB buf status tiles, and preserves the existing WiFi, Nightscout, 1-hour mini-trend, IOB, COB, SAGE and audio alarm logic.
